creator: eric.douzet@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

After an installation by compilation of the packages.

Packages list :

http://www.c-extra.com/en/freebsd-server.php

With the compilation for Xfce-4.8 :

http://www.c-extra.com/en/article.php?AIndex=32

Installation technical :

http://www.c-extra.com/en/article.php?AIndex=29

That does not operate with Xfce-4.8 :

- The USB keys, they do not mount on the desktop.

- It is not possible to launch xfburn-0.4.3

Hoping not to have omitted the packages, thank you in advance for corrections.

That does not operate is firefox-i18n-3.6.15, but it has nothing to do with Xfce, can not switch in the French localization, by example.

The problems are identical Into FreeBSD-8.2-RELEASE. I have tested with the same type of installation.

Best regards,

Éric Douzet

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
